name: Soccer Predict
tagline: AI-powered football betting prediction with 5-step quantitative analysis framework
description: A comprehensive football match prediction and betting analysis system for OpenClaw. Automatically scrapes pre-match data from titan007.com including Asian handicap, over/under, European odds, team fundamentals, lineups, corner kicks, and half-time goals. Features a 5-step quantitative analysis framework: data organization, fundamental analysis, odds probability calculation, logistic regression models, and EV-based betting recommendations. Supports dual output modes (concise and visual), post-match review with automated learning, and iterative weight optimization to achieve 70%+ prediction accuracy.
